title: Forecasting Process with Probability Limits
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps for calculating point forecasts and their associated probability limits in time series analysis.
relationships: Historical Data is used for Model Fitting
Fitted Model parameters are used for Point Forecast Calculation
Residual Analysis determines forecast error distribution
Error Variance and Point Forecast are combined to calculate upper and lower Probability Limits
Final output is a Forecast with a prediction interval defined by the limits
